name: aidd-workflow
description: AI-Driven Development Workflow — 22 skills for structured software development with adaptive depth, TDD enforcement, and subagent-driven execution

interface.shortDescription: Structured AI-driven development with 22 skills, TDD, and adaptive depth
interface.longDescription: AIDD (AI-Driven Development) merges AWS AI-DLC's comprehensive lifecycle with Superpowers' modular delivery. 22 on-demand skills cover inception through construction — brainstorming, requirements analysis, user stories, application design, TDD-enforced code generation, subagent-driven development, and evidence-first verification. Adapts automatically: simple bug fixes use 7 skills, full systems use all 22.
defaultPrompt: Using AIDD, I want to build a new service with authentication and API endpoints
Using AIDD, add a new feature to my existing codebase
Using AIDD, fix the bug in the login flow
